response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified two distinct video parts: 00:00-02:41 as a placeholder/intro and 02:41-04:58 as the song performance. 2. Identified the song title 'Diva' from on-screen text during the performance. 3. Identified the composer/author as 'Aira (Dream Monster)' from on-screen text. 4. Searched for 'Diva Aira Dream Monster lyrics' to obtain the full Japanese lyrics. 5. Translated Japanese lyrics to English for the final JSON.
response.global_summary: The video features a long placeholder screen for Tokino Sora's birthday event, followed by a vocal performance of the song 'Diva'.

scenes.description: A static placeholder image with Japanese text announcing 'Tokino Sora Birthday Reveal 2026' is displayed, accompanied by background instrumental music.
Tokino Sora performs the song 'Diva'. The performance includes dancing and on-screen text identifying the music/lyrics/arrangement by Aira (Dream Monster).

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Place a prayer on the pounding heart
Draw an ambiguous dream
The illusion cannot end just as imagination
Continuing to search for the answer endlessly
Wanting to become someone
Just watched the scattering evening shower
If you gently nestle close
And the heart clears up
I feel like I've grown wings
Because you're always by my side
Because spinning words and singing is my destiny
Even overwriting the common emptiness in the world
Like a flower blooming in the back alley
Longing for a small light that illuminates wishes
A song with no name
God won't acknowledge it
Like one by one unfading flowers
Saying goodbye to yesterday's self
Overflowing tears
It's okay if I can't smile well, right?
Because ideals just keep getting further away
It's already a disaster
No matter how much I reach out and shout
It doesn't reach
I believe that if I wish, it will come true someday
Please, let the song resonate
Ah, the beating of my heart is noisy again today
Only dead ends, my legs are paralyzed
I can't stand
Finding you from a world without sound
And taking you out
Spinning words and singing is my destiny
Even overwriting the common emptiness in the world
Like a flower blooming in the back alley
Longing for a small light that illuminates wishes
If I could become your diva
That would be nice
